description: An integration whose commonfields.id contains an underscore (Zoom_IAM) must produce a CONSISTENT view_group id across configurations.yaml view_groups[] (the registry) and the configurations[]/general_configurations[] entries that reference it. Regression guard for the slug mismatch where derive_handler_id kept the underscore (xsoar-zoom_iam -> view_group 'zoom_iam') while slugify_view_group_id normalized it to a dash ('zoom-iam'), leaving the referenced view_group unregistered (OPA cross-file violation).
